# Schedule Baseline  


## Purpose of This Document

This document defines the **Schedule Baseline** for the project, including:

- Planned activities derived from the WBS
- Logical sequencing and dependencies
- Milestones and Stage‑Gates
- A visual Gantt representation

The Schedule Baseline is a **controlled baseline** under PMBOK and is used to:

- Monitor progress
- Support Stage‑Gate decisions
- Manage schedule changes

---

## Scheduling Principles

1. Schedule is **WBS-driven**
2. **Ecological validation activities are non-compressible**
3. Stage‑Gates are **hard milestones**
4. MVP focus — no speculative future scope included
5. Schedule buffers protect ecological review, not speed

---

## High-Level Timeline Assumption

- Project duration (MVP): **12 weeks**
- Cadence: weekly planning, bi‑weekly validation
- Initial validation fields: **Viola → Espadarte**

---

## Schedule Breakdown (by WBS)

| ID | Activity | Duration | Dependency |
|----|----------|----------|------------|
| A1 | Project Initiation & Strategy | 1 week | — |
| A2 | Governance & KPI Baseline | 1 week | A1 |
| A3 | Data & Environmental Preparation | 2 weeks | A2 |
| A4 | Annotation Guidelines & Pilot Labeling | 2 weeks | A3 |
| A5 | AI Model Development (MVP) | 3 weeks | A4 |
| A6 | Ecological Validation (Field 1 – Viola) | 1 week | A5 |
| G2 | **Stage‑Gate G2 – MVP Ecological Validation** | 0 | A6 |
| A7 | Generalization & Validation (Field 2 – Espadarte) | 1 week | G2 |
| A8 | Digital Asset Consolidation | 1 week | A7 |
| G3 | **Stage‑Gate G3 – Reuse & Operational Value** | 0 | A8 |
| A9 | Project Closure & Reporting | 1 week | G3 |

---

## Key Milestones

| Milestone | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| M1 | Charter, Scope, WBS, Requirements approved |
| G2 | MVP Ecological Validation Approved |
| G3 | Reuse & Scalability Approved |
| M2 | Project Closed |

---

## Gantt Chart — Schedule Baseline (Mermaid)

```{mermaid}
gantt
  title Schedule Baseline — Subsea Benthic Analysis AI (MVP)
  dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD
  axisFormat  %d/%m

  section Initiation & Governance
  Project Initiation & Strategy        :a1, 2026-04-01, 7d
  Governance & KPI Baseline            :a2, after a1, 7d

  section Data & Environmental Preparation
  Data & Environmental Preparation    :a3, after a2, 14d
  Annotation Guidelines & Pilot Labels :a4, after a3, 14d

  section AI Development
  AI Model Development (MVP)           :a5, after a4, 21d

  section Ecological Validation
  Validation — Field 1 (Viola)         :a6, after a5, 7d
  Stage-Gate G2 (Ecological MVP)       :milestone, g2, after a6, 0d

  Validation — Field 2 (Espadarte)     :a7, after g2, 7d

  section Asset & Closure
  Digital Asset Consolidation          :a8, after a7, 7d
  Stage-Gate G3 (Reuse Approval)       :milestone, g3, after a8, 0d
  Project Closure & Reporting          :a9, after g3, 7d
```

---

## Stage‑Gate Integration

| Gate | Schedule Position | Decision Basis |
|-----|-------------------|----------------|
| G2 | After Field 1 validation | KPI‑3 ≥ threshold |
| G3 | After Field 2 validation | KPI‑3 + KPI‑4 + KPI‑5 |

Failure at any gate **halts progression**, regardless of schedule adherence.

---

## Schedule Control Rules

- Any variance > ±10% requires analysis
- Schedule compression **cannot reduce ecological validation**
- Changes require formal Change Request
- Sponsor approval required for baseline changes

---

## Relationship to Other Plans

- Inputs: WBS, WBS Dictionary, Requirements
- Feeds: Cost Baseline, Resource Plan, PMP
- Controlled under: Change Management Plan

---

## Baseline Approval

This Schedule Baseline is approved and frozen upon signature.

---

## Approval Signatures

| Role | Name | Signature | Date |
|-----|---------|------------------|------|
| Sponsor (NOAA / SUB) | {{< meta executive-sponsor >}} | | |
| Environmental SME Lead | {{< meta sme-lead>}} | | |
| Project Owner | {{< meta project-po >}} | | |
